name: Arthur Rollini
abstract: Arthur Francis Rollini (February 13, 1912 – December 30, 1993) was an American jazz musician who played the tenor saxophone, flute and clarinet. His nickname was "Schneeze".

concerts.label: Benny Goodman and His Swing Orchestra

about_quotes.speaker: Teddy Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: Arthur Rollini, Adrian's younger brother. That would have been the real personnel.
